# Board Feedback

I've reviewed the board and have 2 pieces of feedback:

## 1. [01-x v1] (via Ada)
Feedback on: "the sample is small"
> please expand

## 2. [Tracker] (via Bo)
Feedback on: "the cutoff date"
> why this date?
